parameters.jsCode:
const raw = $input.all()[0].json.choices[0].message.content; const cleaned = raw.replace(/```json|```/g, "").trim(); const data = JSON.parse(cleaned); const sentimentColors = { Bullish: { bg: "#f0fdf4", color: "#16a34a", icon: "▲" }, Bearish: { bg: "#fef2f2", color: "#dc2626", icon: "▼" }, Neutral: { bg: "#fffbeb", color: "#d97706", icon: "●" }, }; const s = sentimentColors[data.overall_sentiment] || sentimentColors.Neutral; const themesHtml = (data.top_themes || []).map(t => `
${t.theme}
${t.summary}
${t.articles.join(" · ")}
`).join(""); const tickersHtml = (data.key_tickers || []).map(t => `${t}` ).join(""); const watchHtml = (data.watch_today || []).map(w => `
  • ${w}
    • ` ).join(""); const html = `
    AI FINANCIAL DIGEST
    Morning Markets Brief
    ${data.date} · Bloomberg · Reuters · Yahoo Finance
    ${s.icon} ${data.overall_sentiment} Sentiment
    ${data.sentiment_reason}
    MARKET SUMMARY
    ${data.market_summary}
    TICKERS IN THE NEWS
    ${tickersHtml}
    TOP INVESTMENT THEMES
    ${themesHtml}
    WATCH TODAY
      ${watchHtml}
    CONTRARIAN TAKE
    "${data.contrarian_take}"
    Powered by Groq + Llama 3.1 · Runs every morning at 6 AM · Bloomberg · Reuters · Yahoo Finance
    `; return [{ json: { html, subject: `${s.icon} Morning Markets Brief — ${data.date} | ${data.overall_sentiment}`, sentiment: data.overall_sentiment }}];
